title: Why 2018 is the vintage to buy in Stellenbosch.
description: A cool, late-ripening year gave the Cape’s Bordeaux blends the structure to age a decade — here’s what to look for, and what to lay down.

title: A field guide to Swartland chenin.
description: Old bush vines, granite soils, and the skin-contact whites redrawing the Cape’s white-wine map.

title: Decanting: how long is too long?
description: Three hours, six, overnight — when air becomes a wine’s friend, and when it quietly undoes it.
